'''鈭歯-y-t''' ('''kanayat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vasal|vasal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vasal|vasal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-y-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanayat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinayat|thinayat]] || [[word:jinayat|jinayat]] || [[word:shinayat|shinayat]] || [[word:kinayat|kinayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunayat|thuthunayat]] || [[word:jujunayat|jujunayat]] || [[word:shushunayat|shushunayat]] || [[word:kukunayat|kukunayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunayat|thunayat]] || [[word:junayat|junayat]] || [[word:shunayat|shunayat]] || [[word:kunayat|kunayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunayat|thunayat]] || [[word:junayat|junayat]] || [[word:shunayat|shunayat]] || [[word:kunayat|kunayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenayat|thenayat]] || [[word:jenayat|jenayat]] || [[word:shenayat|shenayat]] || [[word:kenayat|kenayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonayat|thothonayat]] || [[word:jojonayat|jojonayat]] || [[word:shoshonayat|shoshonayat]] || [[word:kokonayat|kokonayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonayat|thonayat]] || [[word:jonayat|jonayat]] || [[word:shonayat|shonayat]] || [[word:konayat|konayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonayat|thonayat]] || [[word:jonayat|jonayat]] || [[word:shonayat|shonayat]] || [[word:konayat|konayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nayat|th忙nayat]] || [[word:j忙nayat|j忙nayat]] || [[word:sh忙nayat|sh忙nayat]] || [[word:k忙nayat|k忙nayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanayat|thathanayat]] || [[word:jajanayat|jajanayat]] || [[word:shashanayat|shashanayat]] || [[word:kakanayat|kakanayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanayat|thanayat]] || [[word:janayat|janayat]] || [[word:shanayat|shanayat]] || [[word:kanayat|kanayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanayat|thanayat]] || [[word:janayat|janayat]] || [[word:shanayat|shanayat]] || [[word:kanayat|kanayat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanayat|shanayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanayat|goshanayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanayat|gokishanayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanayatn眉|shanayatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanayatnkn眉|goshanayatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayatn眉|gokishanayatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanayatsh毛|shanayatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanayatnksh毛|goshanayatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanayatsh毛|gokishanayatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayatro|shanayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayatnkro|goshanayatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayatro|gokishanayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayatmu|shanayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayatnkmu|goshanayatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayatmu|gokishanayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanayatsher|shanayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanayatnksher|goshanayatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanayatsher|gokishanayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanayatng|shanayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanayatnkng|goshanayatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanayatng|gokishanayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanayatya|shanayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanayatnkya|goshanayatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanayatya|gokishanayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanayatyam|shanayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanayatnkyam|goshanayatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanayatyam|gokishanayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayatn眉sh毛|shanayatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayatnkn眉sh毛|goshanayatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayatn眉sh毛|gokishanayatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayatn眉ro|shanayatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayatnkn眉ro|goshanayatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayatn眉ro|gokishanayatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayatn眉mu|shanayatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayatnkn眉mu|goshanayatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayatn眉mu|gokishanayatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayatsh毛n眉|shanayatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayatnksh毛n眉|goshanayatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayatsh毛n眉|gokishanayatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayatsh毛ro|shanayatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayatnksh毛ro|goshanayatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayatsh毛ro|gokishanayatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayatsh毛mu|shanayatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayatnksh毛mu|goshanayatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayatsh毛mu|gokishanayatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayatron眉|shanayatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayatnkron眉|goshanayatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayatron眉|gokishanayatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayatrosh毛|shanayatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayatnkrosh毛|goshanayatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayatrosh毛|gokishanayatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanayatromu|shanayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanayatnkromu|goshanayatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanayatromu|gokishanayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanayatmun眉|shanayatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanayatnkmun眉|goshanayatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanayatmun眉|gokishanayatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanayatmush毛|shanayatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanayatnkmush毛|goshanayatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanayatmush毛|gokishanayatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanayatmuro|shanayatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanayatnkmuro|goshanayatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanayatmuro|gokishanayatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5445898}}
